compiled_state.title: RED: Add sprint design-filter eval test case
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` that asserts the sprint skill handles design:awaiting_import tagged stories correctly.

### Test scenario
When a sprint has stories tagged design:awaiting_import:
- The skill should exclude them from implementation-plan dispatch
- The skill should exclude them from task execution dispatch
- The skill should surface them in an "Awaiting designer input" status section
- The skill should reference staleness warning (design.figma_staleness_days)

This test case MUST FAIL (RED) against the current sprint SKILL.md, which has no design-filtering logic.

### Files to modify
- Modify: `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml`

## TDD Requirement
Run `.claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` — the new eval test case must FAIL (RED). The implementation task (T5) will make it pass.

Test approach: The eval test sends a scenario where stories include design:awaiting_import tags and verifies the skill output mentions skipping those stories and displaying an "Awaiting designer input" section.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval config contains a design-filter test case
  Verify: grep -q 'awaiting.*import\|design.*filter\|Awaiting designer' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] The design-filter test case fails (RED) against current SKILL.md
  Verify: echo "RED state — test expected to fail before SKILL.md modification"
